license_note: Wikimedia Commons image linked from Wikipedia; verify exact file license on Commons page before publication.
why: high-resolution portrait with existing glasses/beard; not ideal for glasses prompts, but useful for headphones/clothing and occlusion stress.
crop_strategy: center square crop with mild top bias, then resized to 1024/512/768
recommended_phase3_use: Use instruct_512.png for InstructPix2Pix clean discovery / Phase 3; use flux_768.png only if/when testing FLUX.
notes: Research input image only; keep attribution/source metadata if used in a report or public repo.
